title: Amazon Global Accelerator
description: Represents an Amazon Global Accelerator with its associated configuration, state, and metadata.

acceleratorArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the accelerator

ipSets.description: The static IP addresses associated with the accelerator

dnsName.description: The DNS name of the accelerator

status.description: The deployment status of the accelerator

createdTime.description: The time the accelerator was created

lastModifiedTime.description: The time the accelerator was last modified
